discussion: This benchmark compares a one-shot ReAct baseline against a multi-attempt Reflexion agent. The Reflexion loop stores concise lessons from failed attempts and feeds those lessons into the next actor call, which usually improves exact-match on questions that require multi-hop grounding. The tradeoff is increased attempts, higher token usage, and higher latency. Remaining failures typically come from incomplete evidence tracing or choosing a plausible entity without final verification against the provided context.
